response: Can you make this email nicer: Hello Professor [Last Name], I hope you are doing well. I wanted to ask you if the meetings on Tuesday night are recorded and posted on Blackboard? The reason for my question is that I cannot attend these meetings due to a 7-hour difference between your location and mine ([Location] GMT+2). Therefore, it means that Tuesday meetings for me are from 1:30 am to 3 am, which is not convenient for me. If the meetings are recorded, then that would be great.
